mapper.insert: INSERT INTO verification_code( scene, target_type, target, code_hash, device_id, request_ip, status, expire_at ) VALUES ( #{scene}, #{targetType}, #{target}, #{codeHash}, #{deviceId}, #{requestIp}, #{status}, #{expireAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, scene, target_type, target, code_hash, device_id, request_ip, status, expire_at FROM verification_code WHERE scene = #{scene} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target = #{target} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE verification_code SET status = 3, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0 AND expire_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, avatar, email, phone, password_hash, gender, signature, preferred_region, growth_value, level, points, status, last_login_at FROM app_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, nickname, avatar, email, phone, password_hash, gender, signature, preferred_region, growth_value, level, points, status, last_login_at FROM app_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, nickname, avatar, email, phone, password_hash, gender, signature, preferred_region, growth_value, level, points, status, last_login_at FROM app_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, nickname, avatar, email, phone, password_hash, gender, signature, preferred_region, growth_value, level, points, status, last_login_at FROM app_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user( nickname, avatar, email, phone, password_hash, gender, signature, preferred_region, growth_value, level, points, status, last_login_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{gender}, #{signature}, #{preferredRegion}, #{growthValue}, #{level}, #{points}, #{status}, #{lastLoginAt}, FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE app_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE app_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, signature = #{signature}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE app_user SET email = #{email}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE app_user SET phone = #{phone}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE app_user SET growth_value = #{growthValue}, level = #{level}, points = #{points}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND region = #{region} AND audit_status = 1 AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO growth_points_log( user_id, type, action, biz_id, change_amount, balance_after, remark, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{action}, #{bizId}, #{changeAmount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{remark}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, action, biz_id, change_amount, balance_after, remark, created_at FROM growth_points_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, action, action_name, growth_value, points, daily_limit, enabled, updated_at FROM growth_rule WHERE action = #{action} AND enabled = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM growth_points_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND action = #{action} AND type = 1 AND CAST(created_at AS DATE) = CURRENT_DATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_session( user_id, refresh_token_hash, status, refresh_expire_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{refreshTokenHash}, #{status}, #{refreshExpireAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, refresh_token_hash, status, refresh_expire_at FROM user_session WHERE id = #{sessionId}
SELECT id, user_id, refresh_token_hash, status, refresh_expire_at FROM user_session WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_session SET refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash}, refresh_expire_at = #{refreshExpireAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE user_session SET status = 2, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND status = 1
UPDATE user_session SET status = 2, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
